backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Employee, Shift, Timesheet, etc.) and in-memory Maps for an HR/employee management system with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking frontend changes like timesheet redesign and submission fixes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of pages, hooks, contexts, and layouts across HR, manager, and employee roles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Aerotek (IU) Employee Management', mounting the app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded pages for HR, Manager, Employee, and Supervisor roles, along with QueryClient, AuthProvider, and role-based redirect guards.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based ErrorBoundary component that catches unhandled render errors and displays a styled fallback UI with error details and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Reusable StatusBadge component that maps status strings (pending, approved, active, hired, etc.) to styled pill badges with predefined color classes.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Defines the React AuthContext with session state management, sessionStorage persistence, and role-based boolean flags (isHrAdmin, isManager, etc.). Exports AuthProvider, useAuth, and useAuthContext hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and an admin token from URL params. Invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Re-exports useAuth, useAuthContext, and getStoredSession from AuthContext as a convenience hook module.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and delegation validity. Exports InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations including employees, accounts, timesheets, shifts, time-off requests, job postings, applicants, and PTO policies. Each hook uses the actor from useActor and invalidates relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, and defines CSS custom properties for a navy/amber light and dark theme including sidebar-specific variables.
frontend/src/layouts/EmployeeLayout.tsx: Employee portal layout component featuring a slide-out drawer sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Schedule, Timesheet, Time Off), user info display, and logout functionality using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/layouts/HRAdminLayout.tsx: Defines the HR Admin layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for HR-specific routes (employees, hiring, scheduling, etc.) and a logout button. Uses TanStack Router for navigation and active route detection.
frontend/src/layouts/ManagerLayout.tsx: Defines the Manager layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for manager-specific routes (team, scheduling, time-off, timesheets, accounts). Structurally mirrors HRAdminLayout but scoped to the /manager route prefix.
frontend/src/layouts/SupervisorLayout.ts: Defines the Supervisor layout with a sticky header and a sliding drawer sidebar for supervisor routes (dashboard, schedules, time-off requests). Includes a role badge in the header and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides shared utility functions including Tailwind class merging (cn), date/time formatting from nanosecond timestamps, bigint/Date conversions, ID generation, and safe string handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeDash: Employee dashboard displaying upcoming published shifts for the next 7 days and pending time-off requests, with quick-action buttons navigating to schedule, time-off, and timesheet pages.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeSche: Displays a weekly schedule view for the logged-in employee, showing their published shifts filtered by week with navigation controls to move between weeks.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeTime: Allows employees to submit time off requests and view their pending, approved, and denied requests, with form validation and toast notifications.
Provides a weekly timesheet entry interface for employees to log start/end times per day, calculate paid hours, and submit timesheets for manager review.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AccountManagementP: HR admin page for creating new user login accounts with role selection, form validation, and a modal-based creation flow.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AddEmployeePage.ts: HR page for adding a new employee by filling out a profile form and creating an associated login account simultaneously.
frontend/src/pages/hr/ApplicantPipelineP: Displays a Kanban-style pipeline of applicants for a specific job posting, grouped by stage. Allows adding new applicants and moving them between stages via modal and dropdown controls.
frontend/src/pages/hr/CreateJobPostingPa: Form page for creating a new job posting with fields for title, department, description, and status. Validates inputs and submits via the createJobPosting mutation, then redirects to the hiring page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeeDetailPage: Shows detailed information for a single employee with inline editing, deactivation, and deletion capabilities. HR admins can update fields like name, role, department, and manager assignment.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeesPage.tsx: Lists all employees with search and filter controls for department and status. HR admins can navigate to add a new employee or delete an existing one via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HiringPage.tsx: Hiring and recruitment page that displays job postings grouped by status (open, draft, closed) in a kanban-style column layout, with applicant counts and navigation to individual posting pipelines.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRDashboard.tsx: HR overview dashboard displaying KPI cards for active employees, open job postings, pending time-off requests, and department count. Each card links to the relevant HR sub-page.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRTimesheetPage.ts: HR timesheet review page that lists all timesheets, highlights those pending HR approval (manager-approved), and allows HR to approve or deny them with optional comments via a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOBalancesPage.ts: Page for HR to view and adjust PTO balances for all employees, showing each employee's current balance and policy, with a modal dialog to set or update the balance and policy.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOPoliciesPage.ts: Page listing all PTO policies in a card grid with accrual rate, max carry-over, and eligible leave types, with buttons to create a new policy, edit existing ones, or navigate to the balances page.
Form page for creating or editing a PTO policy, supporting fields for name, accrual rate, max carry-over, and a dynamic list of eligible leave types, with validation and submit handling.
frontend/src/pages/hr/SchedulingPage.tsx: HR scheduling page that displays a weekly calendar grid for managing employee shifts by department, supporting adding, deleting, publishing, and unpublishing shifts.
frontend/src/pages/hr/TimeOffRequestsPag: HR page for reviewing time-off requests, allowing approval or denial (with a required reason) of pending requests and displaying already-processed ones.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting username/password authentication and badge scanning (via camera BarcodeDetector API or manual input), mapping backend roles to session roles and redirecting to the appropriate dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerAccoun: Manager page for creating new Employee or Manager login accounts via a modal form with validation and server error handling.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerDashbo: Manager dashboard showing KPI cards for active team members, scheduling, and pending time-off approvals with navigation links to relevant sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerSchedu: Manager-facing weekly shift scheduling page scoped to the manager's department, supporting shift creation, deletion, and publish/unpublish actions.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTeamPa: Displays a searchable table of all employees with their name, department, job title, start date, and status. Uses the useGetAllEmployees hook and renders skeleton loaders while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimeOf: Manager page for reviewing employee time-off requests, split into pending and processed sections with approve/deny actions. Deny action opens a modal requiring a comment before submission.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimesh: Manager page for reviewing submitted employee timesheets, allowing approval or denial with an optional comment via a dialog. Timesheets are split into pending and already-reviewed sections with expandable rows.
frontend/src/pages/supervisor/Supervisor: Supervisor dashboard showing KPI cards for total employees, pending time-off requests, and total requests, with quick-action navigation buttons. Data is fetched directly via useQuery with the actor.

Supervisor view of department schedules displayed in a weekly calendar grid, with department selection and week navigation controls. Shifts are filtered by selected department and the current week's date range.
Supervisor page for reviewing employee time-off requests, allowing approval or denial (with required comment) via mutations, and displaying pending and processed requests with status badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/amber/emerald color palettes, Inter/Space Grotesk fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 35) describing the Aerotek (IU) Employee Management HR platform's architecture, roles, known bugs, and existing features for build planning purposes.
